## Research integrity checklist

- [ ] No unsupported implementation-maturity claims.
- [ ] No invented benchmark results.
- [ ] No copied large passages from external papers or docs.
- [ ] No false sponsorship, endorsement, partnership, or affiliation language.
- [ ] References are included where technical claims depend on external work.
